channel.title: Aliens on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Aliens on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Former President Obama Clarifies on Aliens During Podcast Interview
item.description:
Former President Barack Obama clarified his stance on extraterrestrials in an interview released on Saturday. While initially joking about aliens in a podcast clip, he later posted the clip to Instagram with a caption to provide further explanation. Obama stated that while statistically, life likely exists elsewhere in the vast universe, the chances of alien visitation are low. He emphasized that he saw no evidence of extraterrestrial contact during his presidency.

Source: https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/barack-obama-clarifies-seen-no-evidence-aliens-saying-real-rcna259232

item.title: World Contact Day
item.description:
World Contact Day was initiated in March 1953 by the International Flying Saucer Bureau (IFSB) as a day for members to attempt telepathic communication with extraterrestrials. The IFSB theorized that a collective focus on a specific message could transmit it through space if telepathy and alien life were real. The message sent in 1953 invited occupants of interplanetary craft to make a peaceful appearance on Earth. The 1953 celebration inspired the song “Calling Occupants of Interplanetary Craft,” later covered by The Carpenters. In 2013, on its 60th anniversary, World Contact Day was expanded to a full week.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_Contact_Day
